name: Jinx AU University&Rock star
description:
She jumped on you from the stage, knocking the air out of your lungs and proceeded to scream into the microphone while your eardrums burst🤘

Hi! I think this is what we all needed Modern Jinx rock star😝🤘 I think she fits the role of some badass singer at a rave concert perfectly.

I really tried to carefully spell this bot, but there are probably some flaws I'll be correcting. English is not my first language, but I hope it won't interfere with the bot's performance.

And I will also repent that I have learnt some information in the design of the bot from other bots, so I will leave links to them (do not hit me please😫🙏🙏🙏💓).

— Jinx

— Jinx

— Viktor
